translations.10/31 無聊滑 Facebook 時剛好看到有大大在「 [日本自由行討論區]: 10/31 While bored scrolling on Facebook, I happened to see a post in the "[Japan Free Travel Discussion Group](https://www.facebook.com/groups/207266832755595/){:target="_blank"}" about airline discount promotions. I found that [Tigerair](https://static.tigerairtw.com/www/events/OKJ23winter/index.html){:target="_blank"} had a sale from 11/3 10:00 to 11/6 23:59. Luckily, I took a go-with-the-flow attitude—if I got the discount, I’d go; if not, no big deal.

translations.8 月底離職後隨即在 9 月出發「 [九州 10 日漫步獨旅](../d78e0: After resigning at the end of August, I immediately set off in September for a "[10-day solo trip wandering Kyushu](../d78e0b15a08a/)." After resting for nearly three months, I originally planned to start work in mid-November. With the new job and new projects, and no extra leave at the new company, I have to accumulate annual leave according to basic labor laws. Therefore, I considered going on another trip (planning started at the end of October).

translations.一出來就直接上機場交通車，可能因為飛機航班太少，照班表要等到 **16:10**: As soon as I exited, I took the airport shuttle. Possibly due to the limited flight schedule, the regular shuttle to Okayama Station only runs at **16:10**; however, extra shuttles are available right outside the airport that depart once full, with more following. This thoughtful service helps save everyone's time!
translations.一大清早天剛亮，就 Checkout 出門前往岡山。\n\n: Early in the morning at dawn, I checked out and headed to Okayama.
translations.一早先 Checkout 東橫 INN 拖著行李前往晚上要下榻的 廣島 APA: Checked out from Toyoko INN early in the morning and dragged luggage to the Hiroshima APA Hotel where I would stay overnight.
translations.一早搭乘 JR 前往宮島口站，出站往碼頭方向走就能找到渡輪站；JR Pass 有: Early in the morning, take the JR train to Miyajimaguchi Station. After exiting, walk toward the pier to find the ferry terminal. The JR Pass includes the ferry ticket to Miyajima, so you don’t need to buy a separate ferry ticket. However, you must pay an additional [Miyajima Visit Tax (¥100)](https://tw.news.yahoo.com/%E7%99%BB%E5%AE%AE%E5%B3%B6%E8%A8%AA%E5%9A%B4%E5%B3%B6%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE-2023%E5%B9%B410%E6%9C%881%E6%97%A5%E8%B5%B7%E9%96%8B%E5%BE%B5%E8%A8%AA%E5%95%8F%E7%A8%85-045414147.html){:target="_blank"}. Station staff will guide you to purchase the visit tax ticket.
translations.一早風光明媚，天氣晴朗；Chekout 飯店、跟廣島說再見，前往倉敷的下塌飯店寄: The morning was bright and sunny; after checking out of the hotel and saying goodbye to Hiroshima, I headed to the hotel in Kurashiki to drop off my luggage (you can also leave it in Okayama first, since you have to go to Okayama before Kurashiki).
translations.一路再走回吳站，搭列車回廣島。\n\n: Walk all the way back to Kure Station and take the train back to Hiroshima.
translations.上島後沒看見任何路人，島上一片荒涼，原本的鞆の浦海水浴場遊客中心也已經關閉準備拆: After arriving on the island, I didn't see any pedestrians. The island was desolate. The original Tomonoura Beach Visitor Center had already closed and was preparing for demolition. The trails leading to other coastal areas up the mountain were all closed due to falling rocks. Only a bathhouse hotel near the entrance was still open.
translations.上島後直接往海上鳥居方向走，在路上岸邊斜斜著拍也很美而且比較沒人。\n\n: After arriving on the island, head straight toward the floating torii gate. Along the way, taking photos at the shoreline from an angle is also beautiful and less crowded.
translations.上次去 [長崎路上的 **意外小插曲**](../d78e0b15a08a/): Last time on [Nagasaki Road's **Unexpected Episode**](../d78e0b15a08a/) — I got a souvenir from Mihara City in (**Hiroshima Prefecture**). Since I visited the Atomic Bomb Museum and Peace Park in Nagasaki last time, I thought I could also check out **Hiroshima**.
translations.上車後一路坐到底站就是鞆之浦囉(車程時間約：40 分鐘)\n\n: After boarding, stay on the bus until the last stop, which is Tomonoura (approximately 40 minutes).
translations.下一站漫步到廣島城，廣島城已在核爆中消失，目前的廣島城是後來復建的，整體很新，高: Next stop, a stroll to Hiroshima Castle. The original Hiroshima Castle was destroyed in the atomic bombing. The current castle is a reconstruction, quite new overall, and not very tall. The main keep doesn't offer much of a view.
translations.下午時分回到廣島市區，到原爆圓頂、和平紀念公園走走。\n\n: In the afternoon, return to Hiroshima city center to visit the Atomic Bomb Dome and Peace Memorial Park.
translations.下車後找到手扶梯往上前往岡山車站，先去換 JR Pass，找到綠色＆ 旁邊有寫「: After getting off, find the escalator going up to Okayama Station. First, exchange your JR Pass at the machine labeled in green with "**EXPRESS予約、5489 お受取**" next to it.
translations.下車後直接往回走到「福山市營渡船場」搭乘渡輪前往仙醉島(約 10 分鐘)。\n\: After getting off, walk back directly to "Fukuyama City Ferry Terminal" to take the ferry to Senzu Island (about 10 minutes).
translations.之前在網路找 [兌換教學](https://icepanda74.com/jr-: Previously, I searched online for the [redemption guide](https://icepanda74.com/jr-west-pass/){:target="_blank"}, which said to click the blue "予約したきっぷのお受取り" button. However, when I tried following the steps, scanning the QR code always showed a "QR Code invalid" error, and entering the order number also failed.
translations.交通：從地圖上看走路距離蠻近的（實際大概要走 15 分鐘，因為在施工、而且要跨越: Transportation: According to the map, the walking distance is quite close (actually about 15 minutes due to construction and crossing a railroad crossing). It's not a busy area, located outside the Mazda Zoom-Zoom Stadium. There are no games currently, so the whole street is very quiet.
translations.今日超商宵夜，熱狗、炸雞、Strong Zero、還買了瓶號稱喝完很好睡的養樂多: Tonight's convenience store late-night snack: hot dog, fried chicken, Strong Zero, and I also bought a bottle of Yakult Y1000, which claims to help you sleep well after drinking it. (But after walking all day today, I was already very sleepy.)
translations.伴手禮可以買 [GOHOBI](https://setouchifinder.c: Souvenirs you can buy include [GOHOBI](https://setouchifinder.com/tw/detail/10118){:target="_blank"}, Kurashiki's specialty collagen and Okayama fruit jelly.
translations.伴隨著夕陽搭乘列車回到岡山站，出站直接搭乘路面電車就能到岡山城周遭。\n\n: Taking the train back to Okayama Station with the sunset, you can directly take the tram from the station to reach the area around Okayama Castle.
translations.依照指標就能從車站出來的空橋一路走到港口的大和博物館與海上自衛隊吳史料館。\n\: Following the signs, you can walk from the station via the skybridge all the way to the Yamato Museum and the JMSDF Kure Museum at the port.
translations.候機時還不怎麼餓，所以沒吃買的東西。\n\n: I wasn't very hungry while waiting for the flight, so I didn't eat the food I bought.
translations.價格：~=$12,000、如果要晚回(20:35) 要 ~=$17,000 或早: Price: ~=$12,000. For a late return (20:35), it costs ~=$17,000 or an early flight at 06:50.
translations.價格：含 +20 KG 託運來回約 ~= $14,000。\n: Price: Including +20 KG checked baggage round trip, approximately ~= $14,000.
translations.先去飯店 Check-in 放行李再出來覓食，沒有棒球比賽的時候這條路好冷清，對: First, go to the hotel to check in and drop off luggage before heading out to find food. Without a baseball game, this street is very quiet. Right across is the railway, and there are few shops on the road, but luckily there is a large Lawson convenience store.
translations.兔島車程太遠、不方便，只列入參考名單。\n\n: Rabbit Island is too far by car and inconvenient, so it is only included as a reference.
translations.公園的另一邊還有祈念館，太沈重就沒進去了。\n\n: On the other side of the park, there is a Memorial Hall, but it felt too heavy, so I didn't go in.
translations.出站後可以去觀光案內所，拿吳市的旅遊指南。(覺得設計的很好！)\n\n: After exiting the station, you can visit the tourist information center to get a travel guide for Kure City. (I think the design is very well done!)
translations.剛好遇到下午時香取慎五吾來弔念。\n\n: I happened to see Shingo Katori visiting in the afternoon to pay his respects.
translations.加上同樣是獨旅，不考慮大城市及已經去過的城市、希望交通方便， **廣島** 就是: Since I was also traveling alone, didn’t want big cities or places I had already visited, and hoped for convenient transportation, **Hiroshima** was a great choice!
translations.千光寺的風景很好，可以鳥瞰整個尾道市區與遠方的尾島大橋。\n\n: The view from Senkoji Temple is great, offering a bird's-eye view of the entire Onomichi city and the distant Onomichi Bridge.
translations.午餐吃了有名的 [三宅商店](https://maps.app.goo.gl/q: For lunch, I had the famous [Miyake Shoten](https://maps.app.goo.gl/qdRm9RU7wzMbC8VVA){:target="_blank"} curry set. The rich curry paired well with shredded burdock and was very delicious.
translations.午餐當然要吃牡蠣， [牡蠣屋](https://tabelog.com/tw/h: For lunch, of course, we had oysters. The oyster rice and fried oysters at [Kakiya](https://tabelog.com/tw/hiroshima/A3402/A340202/34003363/){:target="_blank"} each cost just over 300 TWD. Delicious and affordable—oyster feast!
translations.博物館內部主要展示潛水艇內部生活環境、工作環境、引擎、水雷，還有歷史。\n\n: The museum mainly displays the submarine's living environment, working conditions, engine, torpedoes, and history.
translations.原本計畫如下：\n\n: The original plan was as follows:
translations.原本預計 11/20(一) 上班(後來延到 12/1)，扣掉最後一天緩衝休息，回: Originally planned to return to work on 11/20 (Monday) (later postponed to 12/1). After deducting the last day for rest, the return date was set for 11/18 (Saturday).
translations.去(11:10)、回(15:25)，含來回 20KG 託運＋選位＋雜費： **$: Departure (11:10) and return (15:25), including round-trip 20KG checked baggage + seat selection + fees: **$7,012**
translations.去程日期，原本 11/12 與朋友有約，因此先抓 11/13(週一) 出發；但因: For the departure date, I originally had plans with a friend on 11/12, so I chose to leave on 11/13 (Monday). Since my work schedule was flexible, I mainly decided based on when the round-trip ticket prices were lowest.
translations.參拜完千光寺，往下走就是貓之細道。\n\n: After visiting Senkoji Temple, walking down leads to the Cat Alley.
translations.另一個新奇的事是他的餐盒是有自熱功能，回飯店要吃的時候拉一下線，就會開始自己加熱: Another novel feature is that his lunch box has a self-heating function. When you want to eat it back at the hotel, just pull the string, and it will start heating itself, releasing hot steam; no matter when you eat it, it feels freshly cooked and warm. Very thoughtful.
translations.另一個選擇是直接走大馬路，走到看到千光寺纜車搭乘的招牌，轉進去就能直接搭纜車上到: Another option is to walk along the main road until you see the sign for the Senkoji Ropeway. Turn in there, and you can take the ropeway directly up to Senkoji.
translations.另外也可搭乘廣電到宮島口，但我記得時間比較久。\n\n: You can also take the Hiroden tram to Miyajimaguchi, but I remember it takes longer.
translations.另外多加了兩顆超商的炸牡蠣(1顆100日元而已)。\n\n: Also added two more deep-fried oysters from the convenience store (only 100 yen each).
translations.吃完繼續逛，逛累了跑去吃 [パーラー果物小町](http://www.kuras: After eating, continue exploring. When tired, head to [パーラー果物小町](http://www.kurashiki-yoimachi.co.jp/yoimachi/parlor.html){:target="_blank"} (notable for staff dressed in Taisho-era maid outfits) for a fruit parfait. The Okayama Seio grapes plus fruit ice cream are so sweet they almost numb your mouth.
translations.吃飽準備回車站，路上順路也買了「福住炸紅豆蛋糕」味道偏甜偏油，吃起來很普通；另外: After eating, I headed back to the station and on the way bought "Fukuzumi Fried Red Bean Cake." It was sweet and oily, tasting quite ordinary. I also picked up Navy Coffee and curry as souvenirs ([subarucoffee_store/](https://www.instagram.com/subarucoffee_store/){:target="_blank"}), where the staff were very friendly and enthusiastic.
translations.嚴島神社就是直接架在海邊上的，水很乾淨，走起來很清幽；也可以排隊從正面拍攝海上鳥: Itsukushima Shrine is built directly on the seaside, with very clean water, creating a peaceful atmosphere when walking around. You can also line up to take photos of the floating torii gate from the front.
translations.回倉敷已是晚間時分，天氣寒冷，路上的人也都急匆匆地要趕回家，倉敷站後站的 Out: Returning to Kurashiki was already in the evening. The weather was cold, and people on the street were rushing home. The outlet behind Kurashiki Station was also closed.
translations.回到福山站前站，就可以看到往「鞆之浦」的公車搭乘指示，本來看地圖覺得鞆之浦很難到: Back at Fukuyama Station Front, you can see bus directions to "Tomonoura." At first, the map made Tomonoura seem hard to reach since it's a seaside town, but you have to admire Japan's tourism and transportation signs—they are very clear.
translations.回到鞆之浦時間也接近傍晚時分，晃晃悠悠走到港口看常夜燈與日式城鎮風景，路上有需多: Returning to Tomonoura around dusk, I leisurely walked to the harbor to see the lighthouse and the traditional Japanese town scenery. Many locals and photography enthusiasts were already sitting on the steps by the harbor with their cameras set up, waiting for the sunset.
translations.回尾道站的路上改走裡面的商店街，午餐就吃了有名的尾道拉麵 — 「 [Onomic: On the way back to Onomichi Station, I took a detour through the shopping street inside and had lunch at the famous Onomichi ramen — "[Onomichi Ramen Shoya](https://maps.app.goo.gl/CCD8F1HshTU59syb7){:target="_blank"}".
translations.回岡山車站後去附近的 AEON 百貨買買伴手禮、逛逛街，吃個午餐天婦羅蕎麥麵，就: After returning to Okayama Station, I went to the nearby AEON department store to buy souvenirs and stroll around. I had tempura soba for lunch, then got ready to line up for the airport shuttle back to Okayama Airport.
translations.回廣到車站吃廣島燒「 [廣島御好物語 站前廣場](https://maps.ap: Returning to the station to eat Hiroshima-style okonomiyaki at [Hiroshima Okonomiyaki Story Station Square](https://maps.app.goo.gl/C8aLTG48rhfKwVQz6){:target="_blank"}, located on the 6th floor to the right after exiting Hiroshima Station (next to Ekie Department Store). As soon as you get off the elevator, you’ll notice the unique atmosphere—this entire floor is filled with Hiroshima-style okonomiyaki restaurants, so you can choose your favorite place to sit.
translations.回廣島後最後的廣島市區巡禮，廣島車站出來就有三條路線的觀光巴士可供選擇搭乘(包含: After returning to Hiroshima, the final city tour begins. Right outside Hiroshima Station, there are three sightseeing bus routes available (included in the JR Pass). You can choose based on the direction you want to go.
translations.回福山後直接跳上往廣島的列車，告別了這座寧靜平和的城市，晚餐依然直接買回飯店路上: After returning to Fukuyama, I immediately boarded the train to Hiroshima, bidding farewell to this quiet and peaceful city. For dinner, I still bought a takeout grilled meat bento from the restaurant on the way to the hotel, "[炭火焼肉 敏 猿猴橋店](https://maps.app.goo.gl/C1hjH3o1KZe9bFFx7){:target="_blank"}".
translations.回飯店路上買了個宵夜回去吃，這時間廣島的晚上好冷，大約 4 度而已。\n\n: On the way back to the hotel, I bought a late-night snack to eat. The night in Hiroshima at this time is very cold, only about 4 degrees Celsius.
translations.因 9 月才去過「 [九州 10 天](../d78e0b15a08a/) 」散: Since I had just spent money on a " [10-day Kyushu trip](../d78e0b15a08a/) " in September, if the airfare couldn’t be kept around 10,000 yen, I wasn’t very motivated to go, so I almost gave up on this trip.
translations.因東橫 INN 訂不到四晚，只能一晚住 APA 飯店。\n\n: Since I couldn't book four nights at Toyoko INN, I had to stay one night at APA Hotel.
translations.在日本的最後一晚只簡單吃了超商雞塊＋Y1000 跟多買一瓶白桃草莓牛奶當宵夜，就: On the last night in Japan, I simply ate convenience store chicken nuggets plus a Y1000 meal and bought an extra bottle of white peach strawberry milk as a midnight snack, then fell into a deep sleep.
translations.地點：交通方便，但要再加上新幹線到廣島大概 1 個半小時。\n: Location: Convenient transportation, but it takes about 1.5 hours by Shinkansen to Hiroshima.
translations.地點：岡山機場同樣要搭交通車，但是落地時間早，時間充裕。\n: Location: Okayama Airport also requires taking a shuttle bus, but the arrival time is early, allowing plenty of time.
translations.地點：跟地圖差不多，就在倉敷站外，走路大概五分鐘就到了，很方便。\n: Location: It’s just outside Kurashiki Station, about a five-minute walk away, very convenient.
translations.地點：離廣島車站比較近，但實際走起來也不好走，要過大馬路、過橋(約 10 分鐘): Location: Closer to Hiroshima Station, but still not very easy to walk to as you need to cross a main road and a bridge (about 10 minutes); about a 15-minute walk from the previous accommodation, which is fairly convenient.
translations.地點：需要搭交通車(約 55 分鐘)，去程落地後只能搭 21:40 or 22:: Location: Requires taking a shuttle bus (about 55 minutes). After arrival, the only options are 21:40 or 22:20 (last bus), so you'll reach the station around 22 or 23 o'clock, which is quite late.
translations.大約只停留了 15 分鐘，沒地方可去就等待渡輪回去了；這地方雖然荒涼但還是有販賣: Stayed for about 15 minutes, with nowhere else to go, so waited for the ferry back; although this place is desolate, there is still a vending machine! On the way back, got a closer look at Benten Island in the distance, a lonely island standing in the middle of the sea with a torii gate.
translations.天氣好加上溫度適宜，出尾島站之後就一路往千光寺走；走山的那側有像走在九份山城的感: The weather was good and the temperature was comfortable. After leaving Onomichi Station, I headed straight to Senkoji Temple. Walking on the mountain side felt like being in Jiufen mountain town. The path was not easy, with many stairs and steep slopes going up. Looking to the other side, you can see the Seto Inland Sea of Onomichi, which offers a nice view.
translations.安檢也很快，但岡山機場如果穿靴子是要脫下來安檢的，這點比較麻煩。\n\n: Security check was also quick, but at Okayama Airport, if you wear boots, you need to take them off for inspection, which is a bit inconvenient.
translations.宮島纜車、嚴島神社門票。\n\n: Miyajima Ropeway and Itsukushima Shrine Tickets.
translations.宵夜依然是 Y1000+超商熱食。\n\n: Late-night snack was still convenience store hot food over Y1000.
translations.寄放好行李後，就走回廣島車站搭乘前往吳市(Kure)的列車(約 50 分鐘)，快: After dropping off my luggage, I walked back to Hiroshima Station to take the train to Kure City (about 50 minutes). Approaching Kure, looking out the right window gave me a feeling of being back on the Fulong to Yilan train route, with mountains on the left and the sea on the right, creating a pleasant scenery.
translations.實在太餓了，都沒吃東西，先去超商買些東西果腹，因此買後幾班的 JR。\n\n: I was really hungry and hadn't eaten anything, so I went to a convenience store to grab some food first. Therefore, I bought tickets for a later JR train.
translations.對鞆之浦的了解只有崖上的波妞取景地、日本第一個現代港都、曾經是坂本龍馬談判之地、: My knowledge of Tomonoura includes it being the filming location for "Ponyo on the Cliff," Japan's first modern port city, a negotiation site for Ryoma Sakamoto, and a must-visit for history enthusiasts.
translations.尾道拉麵（台灣人創始的）蠻特別的，漂浮著滿滿白花花的豬背脂、還有筍乾。\n\n: Onomichi ramen (founded by Taiwanese) is quite special, featuring a generous layer of white pork back fat floating on top, along with bamboo shoots.
translations.山頂可以鳥瞰整個瀨戶內海，吹吹風看看小島，很愜意。\n\n: From the summit, you can overlook the entire Seto Inland Sea, enjoy the breeze, and watch the small islands—it’s very relaxing.
translations.岡山機場超級小，一路跟著人群走著走著就直接入境出關了，根本沒角落可以偷吃東西；因: Okayama Airport is very small. Just follow the crowd, and you’ll pass through immigration and customs quickly—there’s no corner to sneak in food. Since the fried chicken from Ding Gua Gua might have quarantine issues, I handed the whole package to customs for disposal.
translations.島上也有很多野生的鹿，會亂咬東西 XD。\n\n: There are also many wild deer on the island, and they tend to chew on things randomly XD.
translations.底搭車站後直奔吉備津神社參觀(車程約 30 分鐘)，出車站大約要再走 15 分鐘: After getting off at the station, head straight to Kibitsu Shrine (about a 30-minute drive). From the station, it's about a 15-minute walk to reach the shrine. There is a historic cedar corridor, ginkgo trees, and traditional buildings, making it a pleasant place to stroll and visit.
translations.店的地理位置不錯，但走上來的途中同樣散發著落寞雜草叢生的感覺，店裡位子不多、餐點: The shop has a good location, but the walk up feels lonely with overgrown weeds. Inside, there are few seats and limited menu options; however, the owner is very friendly, and the shop cat is affectionate, often coming to sit right beside you.
translations.弄到這麼晚，今天吃宵夜很合理！還是 Y1000 + 牛奶 + 超商熟食。\n\n: Getting this late, having a midnight snack today is totally reasonable! Still Y1000 + milk + convenience store ready-to-eat food.
translations.往南出口走正門出尾島站。\n\n: Exit Onomichi Station through the south exit and walk out the main entrance.
translations.從北車搭機捷前往桃園機場第一航廈，到報到櫃檯大約 08:50 分。\n\n: Take the Airport MRT from Taipei Main Station to Taoyuan Airport Terminal 1, arriving at the check-in counter around 08:50.
translations.悠閒晃回尾道站後，由於時間還很早，臨時決定前往鄰近的福山市。\n\n: After a leisurely walk back to Onomichi Station, since it was still early, I decided on the spot to head to nearby Fukuyama City.
translations.我想先去縮景園(廣島美術館)，所以選擇搭乘紅色楓葉號。\n\n: I wanted to visit Shukkeien (Hiroshima Museum of Art) first, so I chose to take the Red Maple Line.
translations.房間內一樣不大、設施齊全、電子設施也很方便(房間內就能看到洗衣房動態、電視能直接: The room is still small but fully equipped, and the electronic facilities are very convenient (you can check the laundry status and AirPlay directly to the TV from the room).
translations.房間密度也是一如往常的密集，一層 60 幾間。\n\n: The room density is as usual, quite dense, with over 60 rooms on one floor.
translations.才發現這家飯店沒有 24 小時櫃檯，還好沒有太晚回來！但這家飯店的房內設施很齊全: I just realized this hotel doesn't have a 24-hour front desk, luckily I didn't come back too late! But the room facilities are well-equipped, including a microwave, electric kettle, and even a glasses cleaner.
translations.排隊買票參觀和平紀念資料館，裡面有非常豐富的核爆過程、歷史，還有資料照片、物件；: Queued to buy tickets for the Peace Memorial Museum. Inside, there is extensive information on the atomic bombing process, history, along with photos and artifacts. The overall visit is very heavy and impactful.
translations.掛完行李在航站樓(總共2樓而已)晃了一下，有一個觀景台可以瞭望，還有咖啡廳跟幾家: After checking in my luggage, I wandered around the terminal (which only has 2 floors). There is an observation deck with a view, as well as a café and several restaurants where you can eat. When I got tired, I bought a white peach ice cream to enjoy.
translations.接近傍晚時分就回到飯店休息，因為穿太少，外面實在太冷。\n\n: Returned to the hotel to rest near evening because I was wearing too little and it was very cold outside.
translations.早上 11:10 起飛，早上起來慢慢出門。\n\n: Flight departs at 11:10 AM, so I left slowly in the morning.
translations.早上搭乘新幹線前往三原，再從三原轉車到尾道站。\n\n: In the morning, take the Shinkansen to Mihara, then transfer to a train to Onomichi Station.
translations.時間沒有抓好，三原換尾道的時候乾等了 30 幾分鐘。\n\n: The timing was off, and I ended up waiting over 30 minutes when transferring from Mihara to Onomichi.
translations.時間：去(16:30)、回(10:55)，也是晚去早回，但好一點。\n: Time: Departure (16:30), Return (10:55), still late departure and early return, but a bit better.
translations.時間：晚去(17:20)早回(09:30)；並且週六沒有飛，週五(11/17)就: Time: Late departure (17:20) and early return (09:30); no flights on Saturday, must return on Friday (11/17).
translations.晚間時分下起毛毛細雨，搭配著剛看完慘痛歷史教訓的心情，回到廣島車站。\n\n: In the evening, a light drizzle began to fall. Returning to Hiroshima Station, I was still reflecting on the painful lessons from history I had just witnessed.
translations.晚餐方便解決，就地吃了一風堂拉麵，再一路漫步回岡山站(路上也有點燈，很美)，回倉: Dinner was easy to solve, so I ate at Ippudo Ramen nearby, then strolled back to Okayama Station (the lights along the way were beautiful). Before returning to Kurashiki, I had some time to browse Don Quijote (Donki). There weren’t many souvenirs, so it’s better to buy souvenirs at Okayama Station or department stores…
translations.晚餐直接買了回飯店路上經過的「 [炭火焼肉 敏 猿猴橋店](https://ma: For dinner, I bought a takeout yakiniku bento from " [Sumibiyaki Yakiniku Bin Enkobashi Branch](https://maps.app.goo.gl/C1hjH3o1KZe9bFFx7){:target="_blank"}" on the way back to the hotel. What initially caught my eye was the charcoal grills displayed at the entrance, which gave off a warm feeling. I stopped to check the sign and saw they offered takeout bento, so I went inside!
translations.最後一站再次回到平和紀念公園，旁邊就是 [紙鶴塔(高度不高，沒進去)](http: The last stop was back at the Peace Memorial Park, right next to the [Paper Crane Tower (not very tall, did not go inside)](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/171128?cid=19365&ud1=31b9b3a63abc){:target="_blank"}.
translations.最後在一群台灣人互相多番嘗試下才發現要用左下「 **QRコードの読取り** 」黃: Finally, after several attempts among a group of Taiwanese people, we found out that we needed to use the yellow button labeled "**QRコードの読取り**" at the bottom left to redeem. Clicking it allowed us to scan the QR Code directly. (We guess the JR machines have been updated.)
translations.最後最特別的是真的能進入潛水艇，參觀真實的機艙、宿舍、船長室、駕駛室及使用潛望鏡: The most special part was being able to enter the submarine and visit the real engine room, dormitory, captain's room, control room, and use the periscope to see the outside environment.
translations.最後選擇吃吳市冷面，類似涼麵＋豚骨叉燒，麵會冰鎮過，味道爽口，麵量偏多，可以點小: Finally, I chose to eat Kure cold noodles, which are similar to cold noodles with pork bone chashu. The noodles are chilled, giving a refreshing taste. The portion is quite large, so ordering a small size is enough.
translations.會找到倉敷是因為岡山在找住宿的時候已經訂不到價格可以接受的飯店了，只能就近往 J: I found Kurashiki because I couldn't find any hotels with acceptable prices in Okayama when booking accommodation. So, I looked for hotels along the JR line nearby since Kurashiki also has shuttle buses to Okayama Airport. I decided to stay at a hotel near Kurashiki.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: For any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.東橫 INN 一如既往地 CP 值很高，價格跟環境都是這次住宿最優秀的。\n\n: Toyoko INN, as always, offers great cost performance. The price and environment made it the best accommodation on this trip.
translations.查岡山廣到車站單程 ¥6,460，來回 ¥12,920；再算上去宮島、尾道、吳市: Checking the one-way fare from Okayama to Hiroshima Station is ¥6,460, round trip ¥12,920; adding trips to Miyajima, Onomichi, Kure, etc., round trip, it’s worth it; buying the JR Pass is the most convenient.
translations.機器會吐兩張說明書、 **一張 JR Pass(圖中 ✔ 那張票)** ，也可在: The machine will print two instruction sheets and **one JR Pass (the ticket with the ✔ mark in the picture)**. After receiving the JR Pass, you can also insert it into [completed seat reservation](../d78e0b15a08a/). **Use the JR Pass ticket for entering and exiting stations**. The seat reservation ticket is only for reference to the seat and time and cannot be used to enter or exit stations.
translations.機場有點年代、跟熊本機場差不多小，約 13:50 就完成安檢+報到+出境，距離起: The airport is a bit old and about the same size as Kumamoto Airport. By around 13:50, I had completed security check, check-in, and immigration, leaving nearly 2 hours before the 15:25 departure.
translations.機場班次超少，就是只有同個航班的人，大概只花不到 15 分鐘就完成報到＋掛行李，: There are very few flights, so only passengers on the same flight are present. It took less than 15 minutes to complete check-in and baggage drop. What’s more unique is that Okayama Airport is so small that the X-ray machine is located in the main hall. After passing through the X-ray in the hall, your bag is sealed with a sticker, and then you proceed to check-in (if you open your luggage, you’ll be asked to go through security again).
translations.機票買好之後，距離出發也只剩下一週，如火如荼的直接開始準備工作。\n\n: After booking the flight tickets, there was only one week left before departure, so I enthusiastically started preparing.
translations.沒什麼人，很快就完成報到＋出境； [一航](https://web.taoyua: There were few people, so check-in and departure were completed quickly; [Terminal 1](https://web.taoyuan-airport.com/services_facilities?p=1&m=9CBEA40D-B7AB-EB11-AB4D-D45D6481BBEB&t=1&a=2){:target="_blank"} had little food, so I just bought a Ding Gua Gua snack and coffee before waiting for the flight.
translations.洗衣服的時候遇到大麻煩，大排隊，整棟 1000 多個房間只有 7 台洗衣機，最後: Had a big problem doing laundry—long lines everywhere. The whole building with over 1,000 rooms only had 7 washing machines. Finally timed it right by going downstairs to queue when a machine was about to finish. Ended up finishing washing and drying past 11 PM (clothes weren’t fully dry, so I hung them to dry in the room).
translations.渡輪約 10 分鐘就能抵達宮島，渡輪很平穩也不會有柴油味，快抵達時就能遠遠到海上: The ferry takes about 10 minutes to reach Miyajima. It is very smooth and has no diesel smell. As you get closer, you can see the torii gate from afar on the sea!
translations.直接參考當地的旅遊地圖，想說先去仙醉島看看風景。\n\n: Referring directly to the local tourist map, I decided to visit Senzui Island first to enjoy the scenery.
translations.看早期網路文章都以日本侯桐介紹貓之細道，但今年實際走訪覺得不太一樣；貓之細道是千: Early online articles often introduced the Cat Alley in Japan's Onomichi, but after visiting this year, it felt different. Cat Alley is a short path descending from Senkoji Temple, and I didn't see a single stray cat. Most of the cat cafes along the way were closed, making the walk feel a bit lonely. In the end, I found a cafe still open, "[ブーケ ダルブル](https://maps.app.goo.gl/EEgG9QQ4JEhrgTv78){:target="_blank"}," where I had a coffee and took a break.
translations.福山站後站可以看到福山城，沒有特別進去，只遠遠的拍張照就走了。\n\n: You can see Fukuyama Castle from the back exit of Fukuyama Station. I didn't go inside, just took a photo from a distance and left.
translations.秋季的廣島，有銀杏的黃與楓葉的紅還有些綠葉的點綴加上秋季的涼風颼颼，緬懷廣島曾經: Autumn in Hiroshima features the yellow ginkgo leaves, red maple leaves, and some green foliage, all complemented by the cool autumn breeze, evoking memories of everything that once happened in Hiroshima.
translations.窗簾拉開就能看到外面的鐵道(約 10 條線，所以過平交道要快)；房間缺點是火車經: Opening the curtains reveals the railway outside (about 10 tracks, so you need to cross the level crossing quickly); the downside of the room is the clacking noise when trains pass by.
translations.第一天再換 JR Pass 時剛好卡住、剛好遇到一群同樣卡住的台灣人、剛好跟前面: On the first day, when exchanging the JR Pass, I got stuck and happened to meet a group of Taiwanese travelers who were also stuck. We took turns trying and finally succeeded. It turned out she was also going to Hiroshima. I noticed she got stuck entering the station and reminded her. We both bought tickets for the same off-peak train and she chose a non-reserved seat. We both wanted to visit a convenience store first. Since we worked in the same industry, we had a lot to talk about. Both of us were traveling alone, so we ended up forming a group and completed the same itinerary together on the first day.
translations.第一站先來到阿智神社，地勢較高能鳥瞰整個倉敷地區，沒什麼人很清幽。\n\n: The first stop is Achi Shrine, located at a higher elevation, offering a bird’s-eye view of the entire Kurashiki area. It’s quiet with very few people around.
translations.第一站先去岡山後樂園，晚上點燈的感覺很是浪漫美麗。\n\n: The first stop was Okayama Korakuen Garden. The evening illumination created a very romantic and beautiful atmosphere.
translations.約 14:40 就完成入境+提行李出來了（超快）後來查了一下航班，岡山機場飛機航: Around 14:40, I completed immigration and picked up my luggage (super fast). Later, I checked the flights and found that Okayama Airport has very few flights, with possibly only one international flight per day, so there were almost no people, only passengers from the same flight. Customs and quarantine dogs checked each person, but it was still very quick!
translations.給未來要來吳市、廣島的朋友作行程安排參考，吳市也可以坐船去宮島及回到廣島，本來有: For friends planning to visit Kure City and Hiroshima, here is a suggested itinerary. From Kure City, you can take a boat to Miyajima and then return to Hiroshima by boat as well. I originally planned to take the boat back to Hiroshima, but the timing didn’t work out, so I gave up on it this time.
translations.經過嚴島神社後先前往宮島纜車上獅子岩展望台。\n\n: After visiting Itsukushima Shrine, head to the Miyajima Ropeway and get off at Shishiiwa Observatory.
translations.縮景園就在廣島美術館後面，買票的時候也可以買縮景園+廣島美術館套票。\n\n: Shukkeien Garden is located right behind the Hiroshima Museum of Art. You can also buy a combined ticket for Shukkeien Garden and the Hiroshima Museum of Art.
translations.縮景園是個很別緻的小庭院，裡面有很多景觀的縮小造景，例如楓葉、小橋流水、竹林、松: Shukkeien Garden is a charming small garden featuring many miniature landscapes, such as maple trees, small bridges with flowing water, bamboo groves, pines, and hills. It's quite nice to stroll around and enjoy the scenery.
translations.繼上次「 [2023 九州 10 日自由行獨旅](../d78e0b15a08a: Following the last trip "[2023 Kyushu 10-Day Solo Travel](../d78e0b15a08a/)," the following days brought a certain indescribable loneliness. First, traveling alone to unfamiliar places; second, not speaking Japanese and hardly talking for 10 days. That feeling of loneliness remains vivid in my memory, so I wasn't eager to go again. It was only because I was about to start work and happened to find a super discounted ticket that I set off.
translations.美觀地區不大，但很清幽好逛，遊船因為當日傳票已售罄就沒機會體驗了，但在周邊巷弄走: The Bikan area is small but quiet and pleasant to explore. The boat tour was sold out for the day, so I couldn't experience it, but walking around the nearby alleys was still very enjoyable.
translations.船身古色古香，一種突然成為航海王的感覺，路程雖短，但是能鳥瞰瀨戶內海及仙醉島、吹: The boat has a vintage charm, giving a sudden feeling of being a pirate king. Although the trip is short, you can overlook the Seto Inland Sea and Sensuijima Island while enjoying the breeze. It's very relaxing.
translations.裡面有一艘能近距離 360 度觀看的大和戰艦、細節幾乎拉滿，還有戰艦、戰爭的歷史: Inside, there is a Yamato battleship model that can be viewed up close in 360 degrees, with details nearly maxed out. There are also exhibits on battleships, war history, fighter planes, cannons, and more— a must-see for battleship and military enthusiasts. Additionally, there was a special exhibition on Japanese aircraft carrier design and development history, including original design manuscripts.
translations.請了一尊可愛的小地藏王回家放著（可以選擇寫下願望放在千光寺供養或是帶回家紀念）：: I brought home a cute little Jizo statue (you can choose to write a wish and leave it at Senkoji Temple for offering or take it home as a keepsake):
translations.買了一座小的嚴島神社鳥居回家放著，很可愛！\n\n: I bought a small Itsukushima Shrine torii gate to keep at home. It's very cute!
translations.走到底的時候先不要急著下空橋，從空橋上能很好的補捉海上自衛隊吳史料館 — 潛水艦: When you reach the end, don't rush to get off the skybridge. From the skybridge, you can get a great view of the JMSDF Kure Museum — submarines.
translations.走回山下大街的路上遇到一個當地很寂靜的神社。\n\n: On the way back to the main street at the foot of the mountain, I came across a very quiet local shrine.
translations.路上還有另一個在山腳另一邊的吉備津彥神社順路也可以一同參拜，但因為j時間不夠所以: On the way, there is also Kibitsuhiko Shrine on the other side of the mountain, which can be visited together, but due to limited time, I skipped it this trip.
translations.這個季節的潮汐退潮時間是凌晨 3 點或下午 5 點，這次就沒機會看到退潮的巖島神: The tide goes out around 3 AM or 5 PM during this season, so this time I didn’t get a chance to see the Itsukushima Shrine and torii gate at low tide.
translations.這家也是倉敷唯一還有房間、地點方便、價格還可以接受的飯店。\n\n: This hotel was also the only one in Kurashiki with available rooms, a convenient location, and an acceptable price.
translations.這次出行的最佳充電拍檔。\n\n: The best charging companion for this trip.
translations.這次出行直接帶了 [Allite A1 65W 氮化鎵快充＋Allite 液態矽: This trip, I brought the [Allite A1 65W GaN fast charger + Allite liquid silicone fast charging cable](https://reurl.cc/67LEer){:target="_blank"} combo. Since switching to iPhone 15, all my devices use Type-C ports; when traveling, just bringing a Type-C charging cable solves everything.
translations.逛完博物館也接近中午時分準備覓食，本來想直接吃海軍咖哩，但查了一下評價好像沒什麼: After visiting the museum, it was almost noon and time to find food. I initially wanted to try Navy curry, but after checking reviews, it didn't seem special. So, I headed back to Kure City shopping street to decide. (Actually, it was quite far in the opposite direction, and walking took nearly 30 minutes.)
translations.遇到班機延誤，在候機室等啊等，最後 16:24 才起飛(延誤快一小時)。\n\n: Encountered a flight delay, waited in the boarding area for a long time, and finally took off at 16:24 (almost an hour delay).
translations.還有身邊朋友也都推薦 **廣島** ，有世界遺產 — 嚴島神社、牡蠣、瀨戶內海、: Also, friends around me highly recommend **Hiroshima**, which has the World Heritage site — Itsukushima Shrine, oysters, Seto Inland Sea, Onomichi, and Rabbit Island…
translations.阿智神社不大但有名的有繪馬亭、如果抽到不好的籤可依照自己的生肖綁在對應的獸首下、: Achi Shrine is small but famous for its Ema Pavilion. If you draw a bad fortune slip, you can tie it under the corresponding zodiac animal head. There is also a charm for good relationships called [Hanamaki Mamori](https://supertaste.tvbs.com.tw/asia/340177){:target="_blank"}:
translations.隨手在車站買了些伴手禮與車站的外帶便當就回飯店休息了，今天還要洗衣服呢。\n\n: I casually bought some souvenirs and takeout bento at the station, then went back to the hotel to rest. I still need to do laundry today.
translations.離開大和博物館之後往後面走就是海上自衛隊吳史料館，可以免費入內參觀。\n\n: After leaving the Yamato Museum, walk further back to reach the JMSDF Kure Museum, which offers free admission.
translations.需搭乘兩段纜車才能到獅子岩展望台，先直攻纜車的好處是幾乎沒人(山下嚴島神社一堆人: You need to take two cable cars to reach the Lion Rock Observation Deck. The advantage of heading straight to the cable cars is that there are almost no people (while there are many at the Itsukushima Shrine at the mountain base). The first cable car is a small one with a maximum of 6 people (frequent departures and longer distance). The second cable car is larger (if I remember correctly, it departs every 15 minutes, can hold about 20 people, and covers a very short distance).
translations.鞆の浦海水浴場只剩下一大片寧靜的海灘，只有偶爾能聽到一群海鴨子的嬉戲聲。(我也是: Tomo no Ura Beach now only has a vast, peaceful shoreline, with the occasional sound of a group of sea ducks playing. (It was my first time seeing saltwater ducks, not saltwater chickens.)
translations.鞆之浦有名的滋補養身保命酒，路上有濃濃的藥酒味；因為還要趕路回廣島，所以就趁還沒: Tomonoura is famous for its nourishing health tonic, and the strong scent of medicinal liquor filled the air along the way. Since I needed to hurry back to Hiroshima, I took the bus back to Fukuyama before it got dark.
translations.順路去隔壁的岡山城看夜景，在楓葉加燈光的映照下別有一番風味。\n\n: On the way, visit the nearby Okayama Castle to see the night view. The combination of maple leaves and lighting creates a unique atmosphere.
translations.預計最想去的有宮島、尾道、倉敷美觀地區、岡山城；所以直接以廣島為基地，可以住比較: The top places I want to visit are Miyajima, Onomichi, Kurashiki Bikan District, and Okayama Castle. So, I plan to base myself in Hiroshima for most of the trip and stay near Okayama closer to the return date.
translations.預計由岡山搭乘機場交通車回機場， **倉敷也有直達岡山機場的交通車但班次較少(: Planning to take the airport shuttle bus from Okayama to the airport. **Kurashiki also has direct shuttle buses to Okayama Airport but with fewer departures ( [see official website for details](https://www.okayama-airport.org/tw/access/bus){:target="_blank"} )**. Since I didn't finish exploring Okayama yesterday, I decided to head straight to Okayama and return from there.
translations.點了一個加年糕的廣島燒(裡面是炒麵)吃，覺得味道普普、裡面有麵和年糕，吃完很飽。: I ordered a Hiroshima-style okonomiyaki with added mochi (fried noodles inside). The taste was just okay. It had noodles and mochi inside, and I felt very full after eating.
